mapper.insert:
insert into task_detail(id, task_id, task_name, parent_task_id, next_task_id, step_type, branch_condition, branch_route, request_params, return_params, exec_status, create_time, update_time, status, reserver, remark) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.taskId}, #{entity.taskName}, #{entity.parentTaskId}, #{entity.nextTaskId}, #{entity.stepType}, #{entity.branchCondition}, #{entity.branchRoute}, #{entity.requestParams}, #{entity.returnParams}, #{entity.execStatus}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.reserver}, #{entity.remark})
